Home.subtitle: Psychologist, Schema-therapy & ACT
Home.name: Anna Vershkova
Home.tagline: I help you make friends with your own brain
Home.intro: Hi! I know what it's like to be "not like everyone else". Since childhood I've heard phrases like "smart, but lazy" and struggled with procrastination.
Home.quote: My goal is to help you not break yourself to others' standards, but to build a life where there is room for your uniqueness, joy and resilience.
Home.work1: Find the true causes of being stuck and avoidance.
Home.work2: Learn to accept your features (ADHD, ASD).
Home.work3: Get out of the dopamine pit of procrastination.
Home.contactTitle: The site is under development, but you can reach me:

hero.titleRest: of the endless fight with procrastination, anxiety, and burnout?
hero.subtitleLine1: You promise yourself to “pull it together” again and again,
hero.subtitleLine2: and then feel guilt and shame when it still does not work.
hero.highlight: And inside, the same question keeps returning:
hero.questionLine1: Why can’t I do it like everyone else?

devBanner.title: The site is under development
devBanner.descriptionLine1: All sections will appear here soon.
devBanner.descriptionLine2: For now, you can write to me directly ↓

footer.descriptionStart: Use whichever channel is easiest for you, and also visit

backups.title: Backups
backups.description: Create a database archive and restore the database from an archive.
backups.createCardDescription: The system creates a database archive in private blob and makes it available for download from the admin panel.
backups.createIncludes: The archive contains all tables from the public schema and is created as tar.gz.
backups.restoreCardDescription: The database archive is uploaded directly to private blob, then a restore workflow is started.
backups.restoreWarning: Before restore, a database shadow copy is created automatically in private blob. Local files of a Vercel instance are not used for this.
backups.restoreFileHint: Large tar.gz archives are supported. Maximum size per file: {size}.
backups.restoreStartError: Failed to start restore from archive.
backups.uploadInvalidType: Only gzip backup archives are supported.
backups.uploadInvalidSize: The archive exceeds the allowed size limit: {size}.
backups.uploadStarting: Starting upload of the database archive to private blob.
backups.uploadCompleted: The database archive has been uploaded.
backups.createStatusDescription: This section shows progress of the database archive generation and the download link after completion.
backups.restoreStatusDescription: This section shows restore progress and information about the database shadow copy.
backups.historyEmpty: Job events will appear after the operation starts.
backups.waiting: Waiting for the job to start

pillo.title: Pillo
pillo.description: Medicine stock, intake schedule, and reminders.

install.title: How to install it
install.iosStep2: Tap the Share button at the bottom.
install.iosStep3: Choose Add to Home Screen and tap Add.
install.androidStep2: Tap the three-dot menu in the top right.
install.androidStep3: Choose Install app or Add to Home screen.

common.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

today.emptyText: Add a pill and schedule rule to see today's doses.
today.lowStockWarning: Stock may not be enough. Time to buy more.
today.undoDescription: You can undo your previous choice (Taken / Skipped). If you undo taking the medication, the quantity will be returned to the available stock.

medications.addPackageConfirmDescription: One package will be added to the stock. Continue?
medications.emptyText: Add the first pill to track stock and schedule.
medications.formDescription: Set dosage, form, and current stock.
medications.name: Name
medications.stockDescription: Current stock. Calculated automatically on creation, but can be manually adjusted.
medications.minThresholdDescription: The stock level at which an alert to restock will be triggered.

schedule.emptyText: Create an intake rule for one of your pills.
schedule.formDescription: Choose a pill, time, dose, and weekdays.

settings.lowStockWarningDays: Days before running out to recommend buying
settings.lowStockWarningDaysDescription: Pillo calculates how many days the current stock will last and shows the buying date this many days before the stock runs out. The default is 7 days.
settings.appearanceDescription: Customize your app theme and language
settings.secureDescription: All data is encrypted and stored securely.

takeLink.description: Tap the button below to mark the medicine as taken.
takeLink.skipDescription: Tap the button below to skip this dose.

Schedule.title: Schedule & Booking
Schedule.createEventDesc: Add a new event to the schedule.
Schedule.editEventDesc: Make changes to the schedule event.
Schedule.pendingRequestsDescription: New bookings waiting for your decision.
Schedule.pendingRequestsEmpty: No booking requests are waiting for approval.
Schedule.requestActionError: Failed to update the booking request.
Schedule.rejectRequestDescription: Optionally add a reason. The user will receive it in the email.
Schedule.rejectReasonPlaceholder: For example: this time is no longer available...
Schedule.settingsDescription: Configure your working hours and Google Calendar connection.
Schedule.howToGetLink: How to get the link from Google Calendar
Schedule.googleStep1: Open Google Calendar on your PC.
Schedule.googleStep2: On the left, under "My calendars", click the three dots (⋮) next to the desired calendar → Settings and sharing.
Schedule.googleStep3: Scroll down to the Integrate calendar section.
Schedule.googleStep4: Copy the Secret address in iCal format and paste it into the field above (to receive events).
Schedule.googleStep5: Privacy setting (to hide details): In the calendar settings, go to Access permissions for events. Check the box "Make available to public" and select 'See only free/busy (hide details)'

IntakeWizard.title: Short intake form before our first session
IntakeWizard.description: This questionnaire helps me understand your needs and better prepare for our first session. You can keep your answers brief. If there are questions you'd prefer not to answer in detail here, we can discuss them in person.
IntakeWizard.legalNotice: Before starting, please review our legal documents:

fields.nameHelper: Indicate the name you're comfortable with me using to address you.
fields.ageHelper: This helps to better take into account the life context.
fields.mainRequestPlaceholder: What is bothering you now? What result would you like to achieve?
fields.mainRequestHelper: Please describe the main topics you want to work on. You can use bullet points.
fields.checklistLabel: Which topics are relevant to you now?
fields.checklistHelper: Select from the list what resonates with you. This will help me prepare better.
fields.commentPlaceholder: Write here everything you consider important...
fields.commentHelper: You can mention past therapy experience, psychiatric diagnoses, medications, or any other details here.
fields.securityNotice: Your responses are protected by end-to-end (AES-256-GCM) encryption. This ensures that your data is transmitted and stored in an encrypted format: access is granted only to the psychologist.
fields.digitalSignatureNote: I confirm that I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy. I acknowledge that clicking the "Next" button constitutes the use of my simple electronic signature (under GDPR and eIDAS regulations). The authenticity of this consent is verified by a unique server-side HMAC signature of my session metadata.
fields.consentLabel: I provide my explicit consent to the processing of my personal data, including information regarding my psychological well-being.

checklist.masking_identity: Masking leading to a loss of identity
checklist.self_comparison: Constantly comparing self to others, thinking 'what is wrong with me?'
checklist.emigration: Emigration and adaptation to another country
checklist.career_lost: Confusion about career path: 'who do I want to be?'
checklist.work_cycle: Frequent job changes: overwork → burnout → resignation
checklist.procrastination: Procrastination and inability to get things done
checklist.negative_loop: Stuck in negativity, difficulty switching off
checklist.daily_load: Difficulty managing daily load and demands

IntakeWizard.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
